entities.name: PEARL MILLET

entities.name: SURVEY
entities.description: The process of monitoring pest populations in farmers' fields

entities.name: FIELD TRIAL
entities.description: Controlled experiments conducted at research stations to assess crop damage and pest dynamics

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The period from November to May characterized by a decline in diapausing larval populations

entities.name: SOWING DATE
entities.description: The timing of planting, which significantly influences the severity of borer damage

entities.name: STEM TUNNELLING
entities.description: Physical damage to the millet stem caused by borer larvae

entities.name: UNPRODUCTIVE TILLERS
entities.description: A growth abnormality in pearl millet resulting from severe borer infestation

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced by the crop

entities.name: INSECTICIDE APPLICATION
entities.description: The use of chemical insecticides to protect the crop from pest infestation

entities.name: BORER INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of a crop being attacked by stem borer pests, leading to various damage symptoms
